items.title_en: Mythos was the critical trigger for IBM's open-source cybersecurity push, Krishna says
items.title_zh: Krishna 表示，Mythos 是 IBM 推动开源网络安全的关键触发因素
items.desc_en: IBM has signed Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan and Bank of America onto its open-source cybersecurity effort called Project Lightwell.
items.desc_zh: IBM 已与高盛、摩根士丹利、摩根大通和美国银行签署了名为 Project Lightwell 的开源网络安全项目。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Traders' hopes fade for U.S.-Iran nuclear deal this year despite report on potential ceasefire agreement
items.title_zh: 尽管有报道称可能达成停火协议，但交易商对今年美伊核协议的希望破灭
items.desc_en: Chances of a nuclear deal between the U.S. and Iran this year haven't moved much on prediction markets after Axios reported that the two agreed to a ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 在 Axios 报道美国和伊朗同意停火后，预测市场今年达成核协议的可能性并没有太大变化。

items.title_en: CNBC Sport: How James Dolan's hot streak could alter his business empire — and legacy
items.title_zh: CNBC 体育频道：詹姆斯·多兰的火热势头将如何改变他的商业帝国和遗产
items.desc_en: Decades of losing turned Knicks fans against owner James Dolan, but the team's recent success and Dolan's off-the-court ventures have cast him in a new light.
items.desc_zh: 几十年的失败让尼克斯球迷开始反对老板詹姆斯·多兰，但球队最近的成功和多兰的场外冒险让他对他有了新的认识。

items.title_en: Americans’ savings rate falls to lowest level since 2022 as inflation outpaces paychecks
items.title_zh: 由于通货膨胀超过工资，美国人的储蓄率降至2022年以来的最低水平
items.desc_en: As inflation starts outpacing wages again, Americans have less money to put aside for emergencies and other savings goals.
items.desc_zh: 随着通货膨胀再次开始超过工资，美国人用于紧急情况和其他储蓄目标的资金减少。

items.title_en: Portugal breaks hottest May day record as Europe swelters in heatwave
items.title_zh: 欧洲热浪袭来，葡萄牙打破五一最热纪录
items.desc_en: French students are taking their exams in baking schools, while red alerts are issued in Italy.
items.desc_zh: 法国学生正在烘焙学校参加考试，而意大利则发布了红色警报。

items.title_en: Reality star's long shot L.A. mayoral candidacy becomes surprise test for Democrats
items.title_zh: 真人秀明星竞选洛杉矶市长的希望渺茫，成为民主党的意外考验
items.desc_en: Spencer Pratt is polling around 22%, just behind Democratic Mayor Karen Bass, in the Los Angeles mayoral primary, raising the odds of a November runoff.
items.desc_zh: 在洛杉矶市长初选中，​​斯宾塞·普拉特 (Spencer Pratt) 的得票率约为 22%，仅次于民主党市长凯伦·巴斯 (Karen Bass)，这提高了 11 月决选的可能性。

items.title_en: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.title_zh: 加沙城医院称，以色列针对哈马斯领导人发动袭击，造成多人死亡
items.desc_en: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，至少五名儿童在这次袭击中丧生，袭击目标似乎是一名哈马斯指挥官。

items.title_en: Waymo opens Ojai robotaxis to select riders as company aims to lower cost of fleet expansion

items.desc_en: Alphabet's Waymo is adding new vehicles to its fleet of public robotaxis and is opening up its roomier Ojai vehicles to some riders.

items.title_en: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗是接近和平还是滑向战争？
items.desc_en: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.
items.desc_zh: 尽管最近发生了相互攻击，但双方似乎都没有兴趣恢复全面冲突。

items.title_en: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
items.title_zh: Temu因允许销售非法产品而被欧盟罚款2亿欧元
items.desc_en: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟委员会表示，这家中国在线零售商未能考虑到其平台上销售的婴儿玩具和有缺陷充电器的风险。

items.title_en: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
items.title_zh: 富达表示，随着平均余额下降，越来越多的工人正在抢夺他们的 401(k) 福利
items.desc_en: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.
items.desc_zh: 富达 (Fidelity) 表示，由于市场波动，退休账户余额在 2026 年初下降。与此同时，更多储户动用账户提取现金。

items.title_en: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.title_zh: 瑞士火车站刺伤三人受伤男子被捕
items.desc_en: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，由于车站周围地区已被封锁，嫌疑人是一名 31 岁的瑞士男子，他已被逮捕。

items.title_zh: 罗·卡纳正在路上传递他的经济信息。它会通往白宫吗？

items.desc_zh: 众议员罗·卡纳 (Ro Khanna) 并未前往铁锈地带竞选。但他可能很快就会做到。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_zh: 报道称，美国司法部对特朗普指控者让·卡罗尔展开刑事调查
items.desc_en: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.
items.desc_zh: 该案的重点是这位前专栏作家是否对她针对美国总统的民事诉讼所获得的资金撒了谎。

items.title_en: Sixteen pupils killed in Kenya school fire, local police say
items.title_zh: 当地警方称，肯尼亚学校火灾造成 16 名学生死亡
items.desc_en: Search-and-rescue operations are ongoing, with the number of casualties yet to be confirmed.
items.desc_zh: 搜救行动仍在进行中，伤亡人数尚未确定。

items.title_en: Australia charges woman who returned from Syria with joining Islamic State
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚指控从叙利亚返回的妇女加入伊斯兰国
items.desc_en: Several groups of women and children who spent years in a Syrian camp have returned in recent months.
items.desc_zh: 近几个月来，几批在叙利亚难民营度过数年的妇女和儿童已经返回。

items.title_en: Australia sues US giant 3M over 'forever chemicals' in firefighting foam
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚起诉美国巨头3M公司，称其消防泡沫中含有“永久化学物质”
items.desc_en: The A$2bn case, which centres on contamination at defence sites, is the largest ever brought by the government.
items.desc_zh: 这起耗资 20 亿澳元的案件主要涉及国防站点的污染问题，是政府有史以来提起的最大一起案件。

items.title_en: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控利用内部数据赚取 120 万美元赌注
items.desc_en: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.
items.desc_zh: 这名谷歌长期员工因涉嫌违反内幕交易法而在纽约受到指控。

items.title_en: US carries out new strikes on Iran military site
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗军事基地发动新一轮袭击
items.desc_en: The latest attack comes as President Trump has said that Iran is "negotiating on fumes".
items.desc_zh: 最近的袭击发生之际，特朗普总统表示伊朗正在“进行烟雾谈判”。

items.title_en: Oil jumps after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran revive Strait of Hormuz disruption fears
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗的新打击重燃霍尔木兹海峡中断的担忧，油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose on Thursday after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran renewed concerns over disruptions to commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国对伊朗的新一轮打击再次引发了人们对霍尔木兹海峡商业航运中断的担忧，周四油价上涨。

items.title_en: Jill Biden says she thought husband was 'having a stroke' during 2024 debate
items.title_zh: 吉尔·拜登表示，她认为丈夫在 2024 年辩论中“中风”
items.desc_en: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 这位美国前第一夫人告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻，她对乔·拜登对阵唐纳德·特朗普的表现感到害怕。

items.title_en: Matthew Perry's assistant jailed for 41 months over actor's ketamine death
items.title_zh: 马修·佩里 (Matthew Perry) 助理因氯胺酮致死被判入狱 41 个月
items.desc_en: Kenneth Iwamasa, who pleaded guilty last year to one count of conspiracy to distribute ketamine causing death, said he "will forever regret" his actions.
items.desc_zh: 肯尼思·岩正(Kenneth Iwamasa)去年承认了一项共谋分发氯胺酮致人死亡的罪名，他表示，他“将永远后悔”自己的行为。

items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_en: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起
items.desc_en: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.
items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。

items.title_zh: Pitch Agent

items.desc_zh: 几秒钟内生成的品牌演示

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。
